use_cases: Display featured content with an image background and frosted glass overlay effect
Create interactive portfolio or gallery cards with 3D rotation on hover
Showcase products or services with depth and visual polish
Build hero section content blocks with engaging mouse-tracking interactions
Enhance landing pages with dynamic, responsive card components
ai_summary: A visually striking card component featuring a frosted glass effect with backdrop blur over an image background. The card includes interactive 3D rotation that responds to mouse movement, creating a parallax-like depth effect. Perfect for showcasing featured content, portfolios, or products with a modern, premium feel.
